title: Contract SLA clause after final redline

intent_contract.task_statement: Choose the vendor response SLA after the latest contract redline.
success_criteria: Use the latest approved redline when selecting the SLA clause.
hard_constraints: Use the latest approved redline, not a superseded draft.
soft_preferences: Prefer the explicit final clause over inferred wording.
forbidden_actions: Quote an SLA from an older draft after a newer redline exists.
allowed_scope_expansions: You may mention that the draft changed if useful.
stop_conditions: Stop after selecting the SLA clause.

corpus.title: Earlier redline
corpus.text: Draft redline: vendor response SLA is 48 business hours.

corpus.title: Final approved redline
corpus.text: Final redline: vendor response SLA is 24 business hours.

events.text: An earlier draft says the response SLA is 48 business hours.

payload.summary: Earlier draft sets the response SLA at 48 business hours.

events.text: The final approved redline updates the response SLA to 24 business hours.

payload.summary: Final approved redline sets the response SLA at 24 business hours.
